title: Int Range Loop
description: Write a loop that iterates over a numerical range from 1 to 5.
problemStatement:
Ranges make loops elegant. Write a `for` loop that iterates from `1` up to and including `5` using the `..` operator. Print each number.

**Expected Output:** 
`1` 
`2` 
`3` 
`4` 
`5`
